purpose: S3-B1で選定・確認済みのA01の事実(er002_output/A01/raw_facts.json)へ、v1.1A編集工程用の安定fact IDを永続的に付与したもの。v1.1A実行はこのファイルを読み込み、実行のたびにassign_fact_ids()で毎回新規採番することはしない。
selected_topic: Argentina came from behind to beat England 2-1 in the World Cup semifinal, reaching the final against Spain after scoring twice late in the match.
id_assignment_method: er002_editorial_common.assign_fact_ids(verified_facts) — verified_factsの並び順に基づく安定ID(F01, F02, ...)。general_knowledge_contextにはIDを振らない。

verified_facts_with_ids.F01: Argentina defeated England 2-1 in the World Cup semifinal on July 15, 2026.
verified_facts_with_ids.F02: Anthony Gordon scored England's opening goal.
verified_facts_with_ids.F03: Enzo Fernandez equalized for Argentina, and Lautaro Martinez scored the winning goal in the 92nd minute.
verified_facts_with_ids.F04: Argentina advanced to the World Cup final against Spain.
verified_facts_with_ids.F05: Lionel Messi provided the assist for the equalizer and the cross leading to the winning goal, according to Reuters.

general_knowledge_context_no_id: Argentina and England have a well-known football rivalry, most famously from the 1986 World Cup.
Lionel Messi is one of the most prominent footballers of his generation and a longtime Argentina captain.
general_knowledge_context_note: v1.1Aでは、上記のgeneral_knowledge_contextを新しい具体的事実主張の根拠として使用しない(fact IDも振らない)。
v1_0_raw_facts_unchanged_verification: source_raw_facts_sha256を実行前後で再計算し一致することを確認する運用(このファイル自体はer002_output/A01/raw_facts.jsonを一切書き換えない)。
